canonical_definition: FILBENCH, a Filipino-centric benchmark suite that evaluates LLMs across cultural knowledge, classical NLP, reading comprehension, and generation tasks in Filipino, Tagalog, and Cebuano.
papers: Large Language Models Do Multi-Label Classification Differently
